LAW AND MOTION 302, RESPONDENT MEDICAL BOARD OF CALIFORNIA'S DEMURRER TO PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE; COMPLAINT FOR DECLARATORY RELIEF. THE MATTER WAS ARGUED. UPON CONCLUSION OF ARGUMENT, THE COURT MODIFIED ITS TENTATIVE AS FOLLOWS: SUSTAINED WITH 20-DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE WRIT PETITION AND THE INJUNCTIVE RELIEF. THE PREVAILING IS TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER AND COMPLY WITH CRC 3.1312. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN. CLERK: ROSIE NOGUERA. REPORTER: MELANIE GHENO, CSR # 7489.

LAW AND MOTION 302, RESPONDENT MEDICAL BOARD OF CALIFORNIA'S DEMURRER TO PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/ PROHIBITION/ CERTIFICATION. NO APPEARANCE. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. CONTINUED TO DECEMBER 7, 2015, TO GIVE THE DEFENDANT THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. DEFENDANT MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN NOVEMBER 17, 2015 AT 4:00 PM. ANY EXHIBIT MUST BE SEPARATED BY AN EXHIBIT TAB PER CRC 3.1110(F). THE COURT HAS COURTESY COPIES OF THE OPPOSITION PAPERS. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH. CLERK: ROSIE NOGUERA. NOT REPORTED.

calendar.matters:
DEMURRER TO PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/ PROHIBITION/ CERTIFICATION
Off Calendar Dec-07-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Mitchell Green of Nossman LLP telephone number 415-398-3600 for Petitioner.
Jane Simon of Office of The Attorney General telephone number 415-703-5544 for Respondent Medical Board of California.

The matter was argued. Upon conclusion of argument, the Court modified its tentative as follows: RESPONDENT MEDICAL BOARD OF CALIFORNIA'S DEMURRER TO PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE; COMPLAINT FOR DECLARATORY RELIEF is sustained with 20-days leave to amend as to the writ petition and the injunctive relief. The prevailing is to prepare a form of order and comply with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR # 7489. (302/HK)

DEMURRER TO PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/ PROHIBITION/ CERTIFICATION
Off Calendar Nov-16-2015 Continued To Dec-07-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. RESPONDENT MEDICAL BOARD OF CALIFORNIA'S DEMURRER TO PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/ PROHIBITION/ CERTIFICATION is continued to December 7, 2015, to give the Defendant the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Defendant must deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than November 17, 2015 at 4:00 pm. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). The Court has courtesy copies of the opposition papers. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not Reported. (302/EHG)
